creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 211938
svn diff for editors/aee

The attached svn(1) diff(1) UNbreaks editors/aee
Hugh Mahon' has gone AWOL
As a result, so has his source. I have all of his
source, and as a result can host as much of it as needed.
To that end; I'm hosting the source, as well as a web
page for aee/ee.
Please find the svn diff atttached, which provides the
following changes:

Makefile
MASTER_SITES

distinfo
TIMESTAMP

pkg-descr
WWW

That's it!

Tested on: FreeBSD 14.0-FUTURE Cray256

Thanks!

--Chris
